title: EntityUserLink
description: JSON template for an Analytics Entity-User Link. Returns permissions that a user has for an entity.

entity.description: Entity for this link. It can be an account, a web property, or a view (profile).

kind.description: Resource type for entity user link.

permissions.description: Permissions the user has for this entity.

effective.description: Effective permissions represent all the permissions that a user has for this entity. These include any implied permissions (e.g., EDIT implies VIEW) or inherited permissions from the parent entity. Effective permissions are read-only.

local.description: Permissions that a user has been assigned at this very level. Does not include any implied or inherited permissions. Local permissions are modifiable.
